title: Analysis of RNA polymerase II phosphorylation in two-color STED microscopy images
author: Hilbert, Lennart
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This data set includes the raw image data and MatLab analysis scripts to assess the relative distribution of RNA polymerase II C-terminal domain serine 5 and serine 2 phosphorylation in zebrafish embryos. Phosphorylated polymerase II was labeled by immunofluorescence, microscopy images were acquired by STED microscopy and analyzed using MatLab scripts. This extended version now contains image data and analysis scripts to two alternative sets of antibodies.
steps_raw: This data set includes the raw image data and MatLab analysis scripts to assess the relative distribution of RNA polymerase II C-terminal domain serine 5 and serine 2 phosphorylation in zebrafish embryos.
